flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Northwest Nazarene University rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($34.4k → $40.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Northwest Nazarene University rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($34.4k → $40.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Northwest Nazarene University fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2k → 1.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Northwest Nazarene University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.4% → 0.0%).
